keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY SKIN. Skin : Ap., Ars., Bell., Bry., Calc-c., Caust., Grap., Hep., Lach., Lyc., Merc., Nit-ac., Petr., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul. Skin, under : Aco., Aesc., Agar., Alu., Bell., Brom., Cic., Coca., Lach., Pho., Sec-c., Thu., Zin. Skin, callosities : Ant-c., Grap., Pho. Skin, cold : Cam., Carb-v., Ver-a. Skin, cracks . see Generalities; Skin, crusts : Ars., Calc-c., Dulc., Grap., Lyc., Merc., Mez., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Psor., Rhus-t., Sil., Sul. Skin, cyst and wens . see Generalities. Skin, desquamation . see Generalities. Skin, dirty color : Ars., Fer., Merc., Pho., Sec-c. Skin, dry , sweat and moisture, scanty. see Generalities. Skin, ecchymoses , petechiæ, purpura, etc. (Comp. Hæmorrhages.) : Arn., Ars., Bry., Crot-h., Ham., Lach., Pho., Rhus-t., Sul-ac., Tarn. Skin, epithelioma : Ars., Ran-sc., Sep., Thu. Skin, eruptions (tendency to) : Aco., Ars., Bell., Calc-c., Caust., Clem., Dulc., Grap., Lach., Lyc., Merc., Mez., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul. Skin, eruptions, acne : Bell., Carb-v., Eug., Hep., Kali-br., Merc., Nux-v., Sep., Sul. Skin, eruptions, acuminate , conical : Ant-c., Ant-t., Ars., Hyds., Pul., Sil. Skin, eruptions, black , tipped : Carb-v. Skin, eruptions, circular (ringworm) : Clem., Nat-c., Nat-m., Sep., Sul., Tell., Tub. Skin, eruptions, clustered : Calc-c., Nat-m., Rhus-t. Skin, eruptions, confluent : Bell., Cic., Rhus-t. Skin, eruptions, coppery : Ars., Carb-an., Kre., Rhus-t. Skin, eruptions, dry : Bar-c., Calc-c., Carb-v., Hep., Merc., Sep., Sul., Ver-a. Skin, eruptions, eczema : Alu., Ars., Bell., Bov., Carb-v., Clem., Dulc., Grap., Hep., Lyc., Merc., Mez., Petr., Pho., Rhus-t., Sul. Skin, eruptions, erythematous : Ars., Merc., Sul. Skin, eruptions, exanthema : with fever, etc. : Aco., Bell., Bry., Cof., Merc., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sul. Skin, eruptions, favus : Ars., Sul. Skin, eruptions, fine : Carb-v., Nat-m., Rhus-t. Skin, eruptions, flat : Lach., Pho-ac., Sep. Skin, eruptions, granular : Ars., Carb-v., Hep. Skin, eruptions, hair , in apex of : Kali-bi. Skin, eruptions, herpetic : Aco., Ars., Bell., Dulc., Hep., Merc., Nat-m., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul., Variol. Skin, eruptions, horny , horns : Ant-c., Ars., Bor., Grap., Ran-b., Sil., Sul. Skin, eruptions, impetigo : Ars., Calc-c., Grap., Rhus-t., Sul., Tarn. Skin, eruptions, indented : Thu., Variol. Skin, eruptions, intertrigo : Cham., Lyc., Merc., Sul. Skin, eruptions, itch-like : Carb-v., Caust., Hep., Lyc., Merc., Sele., Sep., Sul. Skin, eruptions, lichen : Aco., Agar., Bry., Cic., Cocc., Dulc., Lyc., Mur-ac., Nat-m., Sul. Skin, eruptions, lichen, fiery : Cic., Lyc., Rhus-t. Skin, eruptions, mentagra : Calc-c., Grap., Sep. Skin, eruptions, miliary : Aco., Ars., Bry., Cof., Dulc., Ip., Merc., Phyt., Sul. Skin, eruptions, moist : Calc-c., Cic., Clem., Grap., Lyc., Merc., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul. Skin, eruptions, nodular : Kali-io., Nat-s., Sil. Skin, eruptions, painful : Arn., Bell., Hep., Lach., Lyc., Merc., Pho-ac., Pho. Skin, eruptions, painless : Lyc. Skin, eruptions, papules : Aco., Bry., Dulc., Merc., Sul. Skin, eruptions, pedunculated : Thu. Skin, eruptions, pemphigus : Ars., Aru-t., Canth., Dulc., Hep., Ran-b., Rhus-t. Skin, eruptions, pimples : Ant-c., Caust., Nit-ac., Sep., Zin. Skin, eruptions, prurigo : Sep. Skin, eruptions, psoriasis : Ars-io., Berb-aq., Bor., Clem., Dulc., Grap., Merc., Pho., Psor., Ran-b., Sep., Sul., Thyr. Skin, eruptions, pustulating : Ant-c., Ant-t., Ars., Cic., Dulc., Lyc., Merc., Pul., Rhus-t., Sul., Thu., Variol. Skin, eruptions, roseola : Kali-io., Sars. Skin, eruptions, rubella : Aco., Bell., Bry., Pul. Skin, eruptions, rupia : Ars., Cham., Grap., Merc., Petr., Sep., Sul. Skin, eruptions, scabby , crusty (Comp. Generalities.) : Calc-c., Con., Grap., Hep., Lyc., Merc., Rhus-t., Sars., Sil., Sul. Skin, eruptions, scabby, bloody : Merc., Sul. Skin, eruptions, scaly : Calc-c., Clem., Pho., Sul. Skin, eruptions, scarlatinous : Ail., Am-c., Ap., Bell., Cham., Merc., Mur-ac., Pho., Phyt., Sul. Skin, eruptions, serpiginous : Ars., Sul. Skin, eruptions, suppressed , undeveloped, etc. : Ail., Ars., Bry., Cup., Stram., Sul., Zin. Skin, eruptions, tettery (Comp. eczema.) : Alu., Ars., Bov., Calc-c., Cham., Con., Dulc., Grap., Lyc., Merc., Mez., Nat-m., Petr., Pho., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul. Skin, eruptions, urticarious , hives, wheals, etc. : Ant-c., Ap., Calc-c., Caust., Dulc., Grap., Hep., Pho., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil. Skin, eruptions, varicella : Aco., Ant-c., Ant-t., Bell., Led., Pul., Rhus-t. Skin, eruptions, variola : Ant-t., Ars., Merc., Pul., Rhus-t., Sul., Thu., Variol. Skin, eruptions, vesicular , blisters, etc. : Ars., Aru-t., Canth., Caust., Crot-t., Dulc., Grap., Lach., Merc., Nat-m., Pho., Ran-b., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul. Skin, eruptions, vesicular, dark : Anthx. Skin, eruptions, zoster : Ars., Grap., Lach., Merc., Ran-b., Rhus-t., Variol. Skin, excoriated , denuded, raw (Comp. Soreness.) : Arn., Aru-t., Aur., Carb-v., Cham., Chin., Grap., Hep., Ign., Lyc., Merc., Petr., Psor., Pul., Sep., Sul. Skin, flabby , relaxed : Calc-c., Ver-a. Skin, folds , flexures, etc. : Ars., Calc-c., Carb-v., Grap., Hep., Lyc., Merc., Nat-m., Petr., Psor., Pul., Sil., Sul. Skin, freckles : Lyc., Pho., Sep., Sul. Skin, fungus growth , excrescences, warts, figwarts, condylomata, polypi, proud flesh, hæmatodes, etc : Ant-c., Ars., Bar-c., Calc-c., Carb-an., Caust., Clem., Dulc., Lach., Lyc., Merc., Nat-c., Nat-s., Nit-ac., Petr., Pho-ac., Pho., Rhus-t., Sabi., Sil., Stap., Sul., Thu. Skin, fungus growth, bleeding : Nit-ac., Pho. Skin, fungus growth, fleshy : Calc-c., Stap., Thu. Skin, fungus growth, granular : Calc-c., Nit-ac., Stap. Skin, fungus growth, pedunculated : Lyc., Nit-ac., Sabi., Thu. Skin, fungus growth, ragged : Nat-c., Pho-ac., Rhus-t., Thu. Skin, fungus growth, spongy : Calc-c., Lyc., Nit-ac., Stap., Thu. Skin, ganglion : Am-c., Benz-ac., Rut. Skin, gangrene : Ars., Bell., Carb-v., Chin., Lach., Plb., Sec-c., Sil. Skin, gangrene, cold : Ars., Lach., Sec-c., Sil. Skin, gangrene, hot : Aco., Ars., Bell. Skin, gangrene, moist : Chin., Hell., Pho. Skin, gooseskin : Hell., Nux-v., Par., Ver-a. Skin, hard : Ant-c., Clem., Dulc., Grap., Pho., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil. Skin, heal , won't, vulnerable (Comp. Suppuration.) : Arn., Ars., Calc-c., Cham., Con., Hep., Kali-bi., Lach., Lyc., Merc., Petr., Sil., Sul. Skin, inactive : Anac., Con., Kali-c., Lyc., Pho-ac. Skin, inflamed : Cham., Hep., Petr., Sil., Sul. Skin, itching : Aco., Agar., Amb., Ant-c., Ap., Calc-c., Caust., Lyc., Merc., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Stap., Sul. Skin, itching, burning : Agar., Ap., Caust., Lach., Petr., Rhus-t., Sil., Sul. Skin, itching, heated, when : Lyc. Skin, itching, painful : Bar-c. Skin, itching, pleasurable : Sul. Skin, leprous diseases : Ars., Sep., Sil., Sul. Skin, lousiness : Merc., Old., Sul. Skin, lupus : Ars., Calc-c., Grap., Lyc., Merc., Nat-m., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Stap., Sul. Skin, lupus, hypertrophicus : Ars., Grap. Skin, lupus, vorax : Ars., Sep., Sil., Stap., Sul. Skin, menses , agg. before : Carb-v., Dulc., Grap., Kali-c., Mag-m., Nat-m., Sang., Sars., Sep., Ver-a. Skin, moist : Carb-v., Grap., Lach., Lyc., Rhus-t. Skin, nævi , birth mark, etc. : Ars., Carb-v., Flu-ac., Lyc., Pho., Plat., Sep., Sul., Thu. Skin, nævi, smooth, mottled : Con., Pho., Sep., Sul. Skin, nævi, spidery : Carb-v., Lach., Plat., Sep., Thu. Skin, numb : Anac., Nux-v., Old., Sec-c. Skin, oily , greasy. see Generalities. Skin, oozing : Calc-c., Grap., Lyc., Merc., Petr., Sul. Skin, painful (Comp. Sensitive.) : Ars., Calc-c., Carb-v., Cup., Hep., Ip., Lach., Merc., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho-ac., Sil., Sul., Ver-a. Skin, parchment-like : Ars., Calc-f., Lyc., Sil. Skin, prurigo : Aco., Bry., Calc-c., Carb-v., Con., Grap., Merc., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Op., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep. Skin, prurigo, senile : Ars., Merc., Mez., Old., Sul. Skin, puffed , bloated : Ant-c., Ap., Calc-c., Caps., Cup., Fer. Skin, rough : Ars., Bell., Calc-c., Iod., Phyt., Saba., Sep., Sul. Skin, scars . see Injuries. Skin, scurfy , scaly, mealy (Comp. Desquamation.) : Ars., Calc-c., Dulc., Kali-m., Lyc., Pho., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul. Skin, sensitive (Comp. Painful.) : Ars., Asaf., Bell., Calc-c., Carb-v., Chin., Lach., Nat-m., Sil., Ver-a. Skin, soft , boggy : Ars., Lach., Sil. Skin, spots , itching : Con., Led., Sep., Sil., Sul-ac., Zin. Skin, spots, sore : Fer., Hep. Skin, spots, white : Alu., Ars., Merc., Nat-c., Sep., Sil., Sul. Skin, sticky : Pho. Skin, stiff : Rhus-t., Ver-a. Skin, stripes , streaks, etc., on : Bell., Bufo-s., Carb-v., Hep., Merc., Pho., Sabi., Sil. Skin, strophulus : Merc., Sul. Skin, tense : Caust., Nit-ac., Pho., Stro. Skin, thick : Ant-c., Dulc., Grap., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul. Skin, ulcer . see Generalities. Skin, unhealthy . see Heals. Skin, warts . see Fungus growth. Skin, wens . see Cysts. Skin, withered , shrivelled : Ars., Calc-c., Chin., Cocc., Cup., Iod., Lyc., Sec-c., Ver-a. Skin, worms [[sensation]] : Ars., Coca., Merc., Nat-c., Nit-ac., Sele., Sil., Sul. Skin, wrinkled : Calc-c., Cam., Pho-ac., Sars., Sec-c., Sep., Ver-a. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
